name: FLYVALNY 20!8
short_description: FLYVALNY 20!8 - a stunning, humorous, adventure game with the track of the best music composer MORGENSHTERN (recognized as a foreign agent in Russia)! Could our main character reach his goal?
detailed_description:
FLYVALNY 20!8 - a stunning, humorous, adventure game with the track of the best music composer MORGENSHTERN (recognized as a foreign agent in Russia)!
Immerse yourself the world of adventure and help the protagonist to reach his dream and realize all his desires (if possible)

Features:
Сomposer's music MORGENSHTERN (recognized as a foreign agent in Russia)!
Juicy graphics
Beautiful world
The nice protagonist
